samples.xml_description:
<module id="accu">
    <description>Implement a module to achieve serial input data accumulation output, input is 8bit data. The valid_in will be set to 1 before the first data comes in. Whenever the module receives 4 input data, the data_out outputs 4 received data accumulation results and sets the valid_out to be 1 (will last only 1 cycle).</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data for addition.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating readiness for new data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating when 4 input data accumulation is reached.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[9:0]">10-bit output data representing the accumulated sum.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="ZERO">0</parameter>
        <parameter id="ONE">1</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="valid_in_d" type="sequential_logic">Valid_in delayed by one clock cycle.</reg>
        <reg id="cnt" width_description="[1:0]" type="sequential_logic">Counter for input data.</reg>
        <reg id="sum" width_description="[9:0]" type="sequential_logic">Register to store the accumulated sum.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <statement>
            <comment>When valid_in is high, perform addition.</comment>
            <conditional>
                <if>
                    <expression>
                        <and>
                            <variable id="valid_in"/>
                            <variable id="eq"/>
                        </and>
                    </expression>
                    <then>
                        <comment>Reset counter when valid_in is 1.</comment>
                        <assignment>
                            <left>
                                <variable id="cnt"/>
                            </left>
                            <right>
                                <parameter id="ZERO"/>
                            </right>
                        </assignment>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <comment>Increment counter when valid_in is 1.</comment>
                        <assignment>
                            <left>
                                <variable id="cnt"/>
                            </left>
                            <right>
                                <binary_operator type="add">
                                    <variable id="cnt"/>
                                    <parameter id="ONE"/>
                                </binary_operator>
                            </right>
                        </assignment>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </conditional>
        </statement>
        <statement>
            <comment>Reset valid_in delayed signal when valid_in is 1.</comment>
            <assignment>
                <left>
                    <variable id="valid_in_d"/>
                </left>
                <right>
                    <parameter id="ZERO"/>
                </right>
            </assignment>
        </statement>
        <statement>
            <comment>Set valid_in delayed signal when valid_in is 1.</comment>
            <assignment>
                <left>
                    <variable id="valid_in_d"/>
                </left>
                <right>
                    <parameter id="ONE"/>
                </right>
            </assignment>
        </statement>
        <statement>
            <comment>Reset sum when valid_in is 1.</comment>
            <assignment>
                <left>
                    <variable id="sum"/>
                </left>
                <right>
                    <parameter id="ZERO"/>
                </parameter>
            </assignment>
        </statement>
        <statement>
            <comment>Accumulate data_in to sum when valid_in is 1.</comment>
            <assignment>
                <left>
                    <variable id="sum"/>
                </left>
                <right>
                    <binary_operator type="add">
                        <variable id="sum"/>
                        <variable id="data_in"/>
                    </binary_operator>
                </right>
            </assignment>
        </statement>
        <statement>
            <comment>Set data_out to sum when 4 input data is received.</comment>
            <assignment>
                <left>
                    <output id="data_out"/>
                </left>
                <right>
                    <variable id="sum"/>
                </right>
            </assignment>
        </statement>
        <statement>
            <comment>Set valid_out to 1 when 4 input data is received.</comment>
            <assignment>
                <left>
                    <output id="valid_out"/>
                </left>
                <right>
                    <parameter id="ONE"/>
                </right>
            </assignment>
        </statement>
        <statement>
            <comment>Set valid_out to 0 when valid_in is not 1.</comment>
            <assignment>
                <left>
                    <output id="valid_out"/>
                </left>
                <right>
                    <parameter id="ZERO"/>
                </right>
            </assignment>
        </statement>
    </implementation>
</module>
